This is a one-time, irreversible action. Options below the threshold will release their intents and be marked as failed. Make sure the intent phase is complete.

This language will be used for surveys w: This language will be used for surveys when users have no language preference set

We have taken the following measures to: We have taken the following measures to ensure accessibility:
We strive to conform to the Web Content: We strive to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA standards and the Israeli Standard IS 5568 for web accessibility.
We value your independent thinking. Shar: We value your independent thinking. Share your perspective before seeing others' ideas to help generate more diverse and creative solutions.
We welcome your feedback on the accessib: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of WizCol-Sign. Please let us know if you encounter any accessibility barriers:
We'll help you find similar ideas from t: We'll help you find similar ideas from the community

What you can do in WizCol: What you can do in WizCol
When an option exceeds the maximum, it w: When an option exceeds the maximum, it will be split into smaller rooms
When enabled, AI will help refine and cl: When enabled, AI will help refine and clarify options before they are posted
When enabled, all participants will see: When enabled, all participants will see the survey in the default language regardless of their browser settings
When enabled, all viewers will see the d: When enabled, all viewers will see the document in the default language regardless of their browser settings
When enabled, suggestions that reach the: When enabled, suggestions that reach the review threshold will appear in the queue for admin approval
When enabled, users must watch the video: When enabled, users must watch the video before they can view the document
When should users complete the survey?: When should users complete the survey?
When showing groups only, voters can cli: When showing groups only, voters can click to view the original suggestions a group represents.
When splitting, rooms will be composed f: When splitting, rooms will be composed for maximum demographic diversity
While we strive for full accessibility,: While we strive for full accessibility, some third-party content or features may have limitations. We are working to address these issues.
WizCol-Sign is committed to ensuring dig: WizCol-Sign is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

gatherFeedback: Gather feedback at scale with multi-question surveys

initialSolutionsDesc: Paste solutions separated by new lines
invalidInvitationLink: Invalid invitation link. Please check the URL and try again.
invitationAcceptedSuccess: You now have admin access to this document

landingBenefit1Text: Consensus means solutions work for everyone, not just the majority.
landingBenefit2Text: No fixed options. Anyone can propose and refine ideas until we find what works.
landingBenefit3Text: The winning idea is the one that brings people together, not divides them.
landingBenefit4Text: Watch as consensus emerges. See how your input shapes the outcome.
landingCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of people creating solutions together
landingHeroSubtitle: Build real consensus, not 51% majorities. Everyone's voice shapes the solution.
landingInstitute: From the Institute for Deliberative Democracy
landingProblem1Text: Someone always loses. Half the population left unhappy.
landingProblem2Text: Someone else decides what you can choose between.
landingProblem3Text: Polarization wins votes. Unity doesn't get attention.
landingProblemSummary: Traditional voting creates winners and losers. We can do better.
landingQuote: We don't choose between existing options - we create better ones together.
landingStep1Text: Rate proposals on a spectrum from -1 (strongly disagree) to +1 (strongly agree). Your nuanced opinion matters.
landingStep2Text: Anyone can propose solutions. The best ideas rise based on collective consensus.
landingStep3Text: Real-time results show which ideas bring people together, not apart.
landingTerms: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service
languageSettingsDescription: Set the default language for this survey. RTL languages (Hebrew, Arabic) will automatically use right-to-left layout.
leaveBlankForDefault: Leave blank to use default text
leaveEmptyForDefault: Leave empty to use survey default
loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
loginWithDifferentAccount: Sign in with a different account
markAllAsPilot: Mark All Current Data as Pilot
markAsPilotConfirm: This will mark all current live data as pilot/test data. The data will still exist but will be excluded from statistics and exports by default.
markdownSupported: Supports headings, bold, lists, links, and images
maxVotesHelp: How many options each participant can vote for
mergingPreservesVoice: Merging preserves your voice while building stronger consensus together.
minEvaluationsNote: Default for all questions. Can be overridden per question.

noFlowItems: No items in the survey flow yet

noParagraphsMatchFilter: No paragraphs match the selected filter

onboarding.description: WizCol helps groups make decisions together through structured discussions.

overviewOfDocumentEngagement: Overview of document engagement and signatures
ownerAccessRequired: Only the document owner can manage team invitations
pageDescriptionPlaceholder: Help us understand the diversity of participants

question: Question
questionOnboarding.addSolutionsDesc: Go to the Solutions tab to suggest solutions directly, or write here and convert any message to a solution using the message menu.
questionOnboarding.askQuestionsDesc: You can also convert discussion messages into questions to break the topic into sub-topics.

questionsOnboarding.breakItDownDesc: Questions help divide the main topic into smaller sub-topics for focused discussion.
questionsOnboarding.convertFromDiscussio: You can also write in the Discussion tab and convert any message to a question using the message menu.
rateToUnlock: Keep going! {{count}} more to see new ideas
rateToUnlockAlmost: Almost there! {{count}} more to see new ideas
rejectionFeedbackBody: Can you share why you rejected this document? Your feedback helps us create better documents.

requireSolutionFirst: Require participants to suggest a solution before evaluating others
requiredSectionHint: When enabled, participants must complete this section to continue
restorePilotDataConfirm: This will restore all retroactively marked pilot data back to live data. Only data that was manually marked as pilot will be restored.
reviewAndSign: Review all paragraphs and sign or reject the document
segmentTooSmall: This segment has fewer than 5 respondents
selectGroupDescription: Choose where this question will be created
selectParentQuestionDescription: Choose the parent question for this new question
setDefaultLanguageDocument: Set the default language for this document. RTL languages (Hebrew, Arabic) will automatically switch text direction.
shareInviteLinkNote: Share this link with the person you want to invite. The link will expire in 7 days.
shareMessage: Discover a new way for organizations to make decisions together
showAllSolutionsLinkDescription: Show a link to the map of all solutions on the survey completion page
showEmailSignupDescription: Show email collection form on survey completion page
showIntroTextDescription: Display an introductory message to participants on the welcome screen
signInToManage: Sign in to create and manage surveys
signInToReview: Sign in to review and sign this document
solutionsOnboarding.addSolutionDesc: Tap the + button below to add your solution directly.
solutionsOnboarding.convertFromDiscussio: You can also write in the Discussion tab and convert any message to a solution using the message menu.
solutionsOnboarding.shareSolutionDesc: This is where everyone's ideas come together. Suggest solutions and evaluate others' proposals.
solutionsPlaceholder:
Focus on customer retention
Expand to new markets
Improve product quality
solutionsSubmittedTooltip: Total solutions submitted by participants. AI-generated cluster summaries are not counted.
source ideas synthesized into this propo: source ideas synthesized into this proposal
step2: Rate solutions from disagree to agree
subscribedAfterCloseDescription: People who registered for updates after the survey was closed — a different audience to address.
subscribedDuringSurveyDescription: Participants who signed up while the survey was still open.
surveyClosedMessage: This survey is no longer accepting new suggestions or votes. But a survey is usually just the beginning of a democratic process — register below to be notified about next steps and updates.
surveyDescription: In this survey, you're participating in an innovative system that lets everyone truly make an impact – not just choose, but shape and rate ideas. The system combines research, statistics, and AI to identify broad consensus while preserving minority voices. Your participation here directly contributes to an accurate and meaningful picture of what truly matters.
surveyDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this survey is about
surveyNotActiveWarning: Survey must be activated before sharing. Go to the Status tab to activate.
surveyTitlePlaceholder: Enter a title for your survey
teamManagementDescription: Invite admins and manage collaborators for this document
testModeDescription: When enabled, new responses are marked as test data and filtered from statistics.
testModeWarning: Responses collected now will be marked as test data.
thankYouForParticipating: Thank you for participating in this survey
theNameDisplayedInTheHeader: The name displayed in the header
tocSuggestion: This document has many sections. Consider enabling the Table of Contents for easier navigation.
viewOnlyAccess: You have view-only access to this page
votingDesc: Participants vote for their preferred options
welcomeToSurvey: Welcome! You are about to participate in a survey.
will appear in the review queue: will appear in the review queue
Sort applies to clusters and members wit: Sort applies to clusters and members within each cluster using the same metric
Background trigger merges similar new op: Background trigger merges similar new options into clusters automatically. ON by default for Mass-Consensus questions; toggle off to require manual synthesis.
Background trigger merges similar new options into clusters automatically. OFF by default outside Mass-Consensus; toggle on to enable for this question.
Teach the AI when two suggestions count: Teach the AI when two suggestions count as the same idea. Everything else here builds on this.
Help submitters write cleaner suggestion: Help submitters write cleaner suggestions before they ever hit the list.
When a user types a new suggestion, show: When a user types a new suggestion, show them similar existing ones so they can vote rather than duplicate.
Detect when users submit multiple ideas: Detect when users submit multiple ideas in one entry and offer to split them.
Combine similar suggestions into a repre: Combine similar suggestions into a representative group. Evaluations roll up; originals stay accessible.
Let the AI maintain clusters in the back: Let the AI maintain clusters in the background so the list stays organized as new suggestions come in.
Diagnostics and manual controls for the: Diagnostics and manual controls for the semantic & topic clustering pipelines.
Detects when two submissions express the: Detects when two submissions express the same idea. The threshold here tunes how strict "similar" means for every feature below.
What happens at the moment a user submit: What happens at the moment a user submits a suggestion — in submission order.
Three escalating ways to consolidate nea: Three escalating ways to consolidate near-duplicates after they have been submitted: soft grouping, continuous background merging, and on-demand AI-verified merging.
Groups ideas by theme rather than duplic: Groups ideas by theme rather than duplication. Output drives framings.
When on, this question is included in th: When on, this question is included in the nightly backup at 03:00. Flipping it on also runs an immediate backup so you have a snapshot now.
Backup queued. It will land here within: Backup queued. It will land here within a minute or two:
Continuously cluster equivalent options. Threshold knobs, "Synthesize" button, selective synthesis.
When enabled, options are clustered auto: When enabled, options are clustered automatically as they cross the engagement thresholds below.
Please fix validation errors before savi: Please fix validation errors before saving
\"Synthesize\" runs over every eligible: "Synthesize" runs over every eligible option. "Re-judge" looks at existing clusters and merges any that drifted into semantic equivalence.
Synthesize all eligible options? This ru: Synthesize all eligible options? This runs in the background.
Cancel synthesis? Pending items will be: Cancel synthesis? Pending items will be discarded. Already-processed items keep their cluster assignments.
No options match the current filter: No options match the current filter
Automatically cluster equivalent partici: Automatically cluster equivalent participant ideas into a single proposal so duplicates do not dilute the signal.
When should an option be eligible?: When should an option be eligible?
Pick the metric that gates synthesis, th: Pick the metric that gates synthesis, then set its threshold.
Gate by how many people have evaluated t: Gate by how many people have evaluated the option.
Gate by how much agreement the option ha: Gate by how much agreement the option has reached.
Options will only be synthesized after t: Options will only be synthesized after this many people evaluate them.
Options will only be synthesized once th: Options will only be synthesized once their consensus score reaches this value.
These knobs control when two options are: These knobs control when two options are considered the same idea. The defaults work for most questions — only change them if you know why.
options exist but none have crossed the: options exist but none have crossed the threshold yet.
Try clearing the search or filters to se: Try clearing the search or filters to see more options.
Trigger a run above to start clustering: Trigger a run above to start clustering eligible options.
Runs automatically as options arrive or: Runs automatically as options arrive or cross the threshold.
Triggers on every new option and on ever: Triggers on every new option and on every threshold crossing.
Turn synthesis on (above) to start clust: Turn synthesis on (above) to start clustering options automatically.
Trigger a clustering run on the existing: Trigger a clustering run on the existing backlog right now.
Background synthesis is active. No on-de: Background synthesis is active. No on-demand runs queued.
Synthesis is off. No background or on-de: Synthesis is off. No background or on-demand runs are happening.
Continuous synthesis is off. On-demand a: Continuous synthesis is off. On-demand actions below are still available.
Label every idea in simple terms from th: Label every idea in simple terms from the first statement, and catch same-meaning suggestions that use different words. Turning it on runs a first pass over existing statements.
synthesisSettingsDescription: Live synthesis automatically merges near-duplicate options into clusters as participants vote. Enabled by default for Mass-Consensus questions.
liveSynthSurveyNote: Master kill switch. When off, no question in this survey will auto-synthesize regardless of per-question setting.
synthesisDisabledTooltip: Enable synthesis at the survey level to use this
synthesisLiveTitle: Live synthesis is on — new options will auto-merge with similar existing ones when they cross the evaluation threshold.
synthesisLiveWithCountTitle: {{count}} options grouped into clusters by AI synthesis
synthesisSurveyOffTitle: Disabled at the survey level. Turn on the survey-level toggle to re-enable.
synthesisDisabledTitle: Live synthesis is off for this question. New options stay separate.
synthesisSurveyOnDescription: Live synthesis runs automatically as participants vote. New options that cross the evaluation threshold are merged into clusters with similar existing options.
synthesisSurveyOffDescription: Live synthesis is turned OFF for this survey. No question will auto-merge options. Turn it back on in Edit Survey → AI Synthesis.
synthesizeNowDescription: Manually trigger synthesis across all enabled questions in this survey. Useful before reviewing results or after a batch of new responses.
Reading is always open. Sign in to post: Reading is always open. Sign in to post answers, evidence, and votes.
Ask something people can answer with opt: Ask something people can answer with options, then debate with evidence.
e.g. Should our city ban cars from the o: e.g. Should our city ban cars from the old town?
You'll be asked to sign in to create it.
No answers yet — propose the first optio: No answers yet — propose the first option below.
Propose an answer to this question…: Propose an answer to this question…
Add evidence that strengthens this claim: Add evidence that strengthens this claim…
Point out a flaw or counter-argument…: Point out a flaw or counter-argument…
You'll be asked to sign in to post.
Add a word for the link: Add a word for the link
Vote — shows consensus · evaluators · av: Vote — shows consensus · evaluators · average vote
Corroboration level — click to rate how: Corroboration level — click to rate how correct this is
Sign in with Google to join this private: Sign in with Google to join this private conversation.
Re-cluster from scratch? This dissolves: Re-cluster from scratch? This dissolves all current clusters for this question (restoring the original options) and rebuilds them. Use this if the clusters look wrong.
Delete this cluster? Its notes will move: Delete this cluster? Its notes will move to Ungrouped.
This cluster was made from these respons: This cluster was made from these responses
Set how large the cluster titles and the: Set how large the cluster titles and the response cards appear on the map.
Choose whether the map groups responses: Choose whether the map groups responses into clusters, or shows every response on its own.
Show what each cluster was made from: Show what each cluster was made from
Display a \"made from N responses\" line: Display a "made from N responses" line on each cluster so people see how it was formed.
Control how the cluster map looks: text: Control how the cluster map looks: text size, which layers show, and provenance.
Only show responses at or above this sco: Only show responses at or above this score
When on, anyone who can view the map can: When on, anyone who can view the map can adjust the filter
How user names appear in comments, sugge: How user names appear in comments, suggestions and typing indicators
Names collected in the pre-form are visi: Names collected in the pre-form are visible to everyone viewing the document. Users without a name answer appear with an anonymous name.
To show names from the pre-form, enable: To show names from the pre-form, enable a custom demographics survey below
Requires a name question in the demograp: Requires a name question in the demographics survey
Which city do you live in?: Which city do you live in?
signInToRate: Sign in to rate this document
satisfactionQuestion: How satisfied are you with this document?
satisfactionFeedbackBody: Can you share why you are not fully satisfied with this document? Your feedback helps us improve it.
satisfactionFeedbackError: Could not send feedback. You can try again or skip.
Choose what users see at the bottom of t: Choose what users see at the bottom of the document: Sign/Reject buttons or a satisfaction rating scale
Users rate their satisfaction with the d: Users rate their satisfaction with the document from very unsatisfied to very satisfied. Users who are not fully satisfied are asked to explain why.
satisfactionPositiveFeedbackBody: Can you share what you liked about this document? Knowing what worked well helps us keep it that way.
minWordsHint: Require each response to have at least this many words. 0 = no minimum.
ratingModeHint: Reactions use a positive-only scale (no disagree). Applies across all apps.
Reactions use a positive-only scale (no: Reactions use a positive-only scale (no disagree). Applies across all apps.
Remove participant data used for testing: Remove participant data used for testing, or clean up abusive content. Every deletion can be restored from the recycle bin below.
Removes every signature, comment, sugges: Removes every signature, comment, suggestion, vote, approval and survey response on this document. The document text and its paragraphs are kept.
Restore data that was deleted by mistake: Restore data that was deleted by mistake.
Blocked users cannot sign, comment, sugg: Blocked users cannot sign, comment, suggest, vote or approve on this document.
Delete all of this user’s data on this d: Delete all of this user’s data on this document (restorable)
You are not permitted to contribute to t: You are not permitted to contribute to this document
How your community read, discussed, and: How your community read, discussed, and decided on this document
The AI is analyzing your document data. This can take a minute.
No AI report yet. Generate one to get in: No AI report yet. Generate one to get insights and recommendations.
